title: Surgeon Vacancy at Laurus Labs Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Laurus Labs Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Laurus Labs Capital India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Laurus Labs Capital India:
Laurus Labs Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
